Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.SynthesisConstraints

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.SynthesisConstraints
Enclosing class:
ProcessResearchSpec
public static class ProcessResearchSpec.SynthesisConstraints extends Object
Hard acceptance constraints for generated synthesis candidates.
